purpose.paragraph: Archive an OpenSpec change by name, using the OpenSpec CLI, so completed changes can be reconciled and removed from the active change list.

accepted-inputs.input: change-name: the OpenSpec change name to archive

workflow.step: Verify the OpenSpec CLI is available.
Verify the change exists before attempting to archive it.
From the documentation/ working directory, execute openspec archive change-name.
If the archive command fails, surface the OpenSpec CLI output and stop.
If the archive command succeeds, report a success message that includes change-name.

safeguards.constraint: Do not guess or auto-correct the change name.
Do not claim success when openspec archive fails.
Do not run openspec archive unless the change exists.
